description: Blending plush two-tone suede with rustic leather, these ankle boots are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. The high top styling with stitch seams at the toe box is a sartorial reference to the spirit of adventure. Wear these with form fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlaysBrand badge on the lateral side of the heelFive-hole lace ups with metal ringsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe box MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction and a raised heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
